name: TENNISTRONIC
short_description: Increase your reflexes by hitting the ball that reaches higher speed with each bounce, and at the same time give it spin to score a goal to your opponent.
detailed_description:
TENNISTRONIC is a 3D game based on sports similar to tennis or paddle. It increases your reflexes due to the high speed that you end up reaching. Set in a futuristic aesthetic, you will have to move your racket from left to right to stop the ball that will increase in speed with each bounce, you can also give effect to the ball, both right and left to influence its trajectory.

The player who gets to 15 points first wins the game !!!!

FEATURES:

  • Increase your reflexes by hitting the ball that reaches more and more speed, and at the same time get to score a goal to your opponent.

  • Play split screen with another friend, using two gamepads (both with vibration), or gamepad and keyboard.

  • Compete against the AI in “single player” mode.

  • Be surprised by the naturalness of the AI, which will anticipate your movements, you will not be able to differentiate it from a human, and has three levels of difficulty.

  • Hit the ball with spin without using extra buttons. If you are moving the racquet left or right when hitting the ball, the ball will change its trajectory.

  • Enjoy an immersive and dynamic 3D game, thanks to the movement of the camera that always offers you the most suitable angle according to your position, and to the vibration of the gamepad when you hit the ball, and even more if you hit it with spin, it will also do it if you score a point.

  • Check your points score against other players on the leaderboards when you beat the AI, as well as your achievements.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Russian, Italian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Ukrainian
